title: erigeron hyperboreus
intro: Erigeron hyperboreus, also known as the Arctic fleabane or alpine fleabane, is a species of flowering plant in the daisy family that is native to the Arctic regions of North America, Europe, and Asia. The plant is used in herbal medicine due to its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which are attributed to its high concentration of terpenoids and flavonoids. The medicinal properties of Erigeron hyperboreus can help alleviate digestive issues, reduce inflammation, and promote wound healing, offering various health benefits such as improved gut health and immune system function. Erigeron hyperboreus can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or infused oil, making it a versatile and accessible herbal remedy for those looking to harness its medicinal properties.
